title: Shadowed Realms
description: A modpack about a world cast into eternal night i made for fun, why not post it
body:
the world has been cast into an eternal night, im working on making brightness dependent features such as certan enemies being faster in the dark, or getting slowed in the light, ive also got a lot of my favorate mods like create, ars nouvaeu, and the ather

i made this for fun, its designed to be a lot harder than vanilla, so if you want a challenge this is a modpack for that
the start is a bit slow but once you get going its a lot faster


<details>
<summary>WIPs</summary>

a lot of textures arent added yet i will add them next update
Quests are a WIP and will be added at a later point

</details>

<details>
<summary>Getting Wood</summary>

Find gravel to get flint

Shatter the flint on **Stone**

Get Sticks from leaves or any other source

Refine the stick the same way as the flint

Get Plant Fiber From _small_ grass

Make a **Crude Fiber Knife**

kill a large animal like a cow, or a sheep to get sinew

use the sinew and plant fiber to make a crude binding

use a refined stick, crude binding, and flint shard to make a crude axe

:3

</details>



### PLEASE DO NOT REDISTRIBUTE THIS MODPACK
